history.qwen_observation: EqualsVerifier tests fail on Java 21 because the bundled Byte Buddy version does not support JDK 21 yet.
history.qwen_rationale: Upgrading the equalsverifier dependency to 3.16.1 brings in a newer Byte Buddy that officially supports Java 21, resolving the IllegalArgumentException thrown during test execution.

history.qwen_observation: EqualsVerifier tests crash on JDK 21 because the bundled Byte Buddy version lacks official Java 21 support.
history.qwen_rationale: Upgrading EqualsVerifier to 4.0.0 brings in Byte Buddy 1.14.12+, which officially supports Java 21, eliminating the IllegalArgumentException during test execution without altering test logic.

history.qwen_observation: EqualsVerifier tests fail on JDK 21 because the bundled Byte Buddy version (1.14.x) does not officially support Java 21, throwing IllegalArgumentException.
history.qwen_rationale: Upgrading EqualsVerifier to 4.1.0 pulls in Byte Buddy 1.15+, which adds official support for Java 21, resolving the reflection/module compatibility issue in the equals/hashCode contract tests.
